nasb.text: They said, “It is a lie, tell us now.” And he said, “Thus and thus he said to me, ‘Thus says the Lord, “I have anointed you king over Israel.” ’ ”

esv.text: And they said, “That is not true; tell us now.” And he said, “Thus and so he spoke to me, saying, ‘Thus says the Lord, I anoint you king over Israel.’”

cnv.text: 他們說：“謊話！請你告訴我們吧。”他說：“他這樣對我說：‘耶和華這樣說：我已經膏立你作王統治以色列。’”

ccb.text: 他们说：“我们不知道，你告诉我们吧！”耶户说：“他告诉我，耶和华说膏立我做以色列王。”
